name: Metamorphosis
summary:
An Extraordinary Journey Through a Surreal World

If navigating daily life in 1900s Vienna isn’t complicated enough for Gregor, things take a truly Kafkaesque turn one morning when he awakens to discover he’s been transformed into... a cockroach.

Armed with only your wit and strange new appendages, embark on a mind-bending journey to unravel the mystery behind your metamorphosis.

Welcome to a World Unlike Any Other

In this surreal first person adventure-platformer, everyday objects loom like towering...
